biography: Chance Perdomo (19 October 1996 – 29 or 30 March 2024) was an American-born British actor. He was known for his roles in the BBC Three film Killed by My Debt (2018), as Ambrose Spellman in the Netflix series Chilling Adventures of Sabrina (2018 – 2020), and as Andre Anderson in the Prime Video series Gen V (2023).
name: Chance Perdomo
